title: Committed fixture task
test_first_requirement: Run the named covering test and record its failing result before implementation.
acceptance_criteria: The committed task artifact validates without any live .wcbs directory.
preserved_behavior: The clean-checkout gate remains independent of developer-local state.
global_constraints_verbatim: Audit wide. Fix narrow. Prove everything.
stop_conditions: Stop rather than guess if a required artifact field is unknown.
